appliedUpdates.description: Added 'Flow Validator Guidance: GIC Source Inspection' and 'Flow Validator Guidance: GIC Build and QEMU' sections with key source file paths and testing procedures

keyFindings: InterruptController trait fully defined with 7 methods, all implemented in GicV3
GICv2 artifacts completely removed from kernel source (.rs files)
Static dispatch only — no dyn InterruptController
All ICC asm uses options(nostack) without nomem, with SAFETY comments on every unsafe block
GICD uses IROUTER with ARE_NS=1, GICR uses core_id * 0x20000 stride
DTB parsing uses arm,gic-v3, handles 2+ reg entries
Per-core idle tracking (is_idle) correctly implemented in scheduler
Kernel builds cleanly (1 warning: unused send_ipi — expected, used in next milestone)
Smoke test: all 17 checks pass, all 4 cores online with GICv3
Integration test: full display pipeline functional (1280x800)
Stress test: ALL PASS in 40s (no panics, no crashes)
5 IPI affinity encoding tests for cores 0-3 all pass
